title: cyathea squamata
intro: Cyathea squamata, also known as the mountain tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyathea squamata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, with the most common method being a decoction of its rhizomes to treat various ailments.
